name: Carob Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash ripe banana with a fork until you have 1/4 cup.
2. Beat the mashed banana and vegetable oil together until creamy.
3. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
4. Mix in the unbleached white flour, rolled oats, and carob chips until combined.
5. Scoop spoonfuls of batter onto lightly oiled baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until the edges start to brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks.
